DP.050.0000:
Hello.
This is the Canalave Library.\f
Please keep quiet while you’re on
the premises.
DP.050.0001:
H-hello!
This is the Canalave Library.\f
Please keep quiet while you’re on
the premises.\f
It certainly wasn’t me who screamed,\f
[FF01,00C8]“Gyaaah!!”[FF01,0064]\f
[FF01,00C8][FF01,0064]or shouted,\f
[FF01,00C8]“Help meee!!”[FF01,0064]\f
[FF01,00C8][FF01,0064]No, really, that wasn’t me
screaming!
DP.050.0003:
What is it? Please don’t disturb
me when I’m reading.\f
DP.050.0004:
I’ve been asking people not to
disturb me while I’m reading...\f
I shouldn’t even have bothered...
I’m all agitated now!
DP.050.0005:
The ceiling-high bookshelves are
crammed with books.
DP.050.0006:
The shelves are lined with books
worn from being read by many people.
